content_body: We came here not really knowing what to expect. When we got here we experienced many great things. What a beautiful cabin with all the amenities you need! With 3 other couples the cabin was big enough and definitely cozy and comfortable enough. The snow fell a little while we were here which really put us all in a romantic & traditional mood. I found good times, good friends & great love here in the Blue Ridge Mountains.
title: We Experienced Many Great Things!
